steps.title: Distribute the 2 into the parentheses
steps.content: Use the distributive property to multiply 2 by each term inside: $$2(ab - 3) + 2 = 2 \cdot ab - 2 \cdot 3 + 2 = 2ab - 6 + 2$$

steps.title: Combine the constant terms
steps.content: Add $-6 + 2$ to simplify: $$2ab - 6 + 2 = 2ab - 4$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
